response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video, identified two distinct vocal performances and a transition/talk segment. 2. Identified 'Dawn Blue' performed by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope (00:00-02:22), and '罪と蜜' performed by syudou and Mori Calliope (03:36-04:59). 3. Determined original artists to be Mori Calliope for 'Dawn Blue' and syudou for '罪と蜜' based on song information searches. 4. Retrieved full lyrics for both songs using web searches, ensuring correct escaping for JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two vocal performances by VTubers and a talking segment. The first performance is 'Dawn Blue' by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope, and the second is '罪と蜜' (Tsumi to Mitsu) by syudou and Mori Calliope.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope perform 'Dawn Blue'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
つかまえて、ほら この shooting star
A world of our fiction awaits...
ずっと同じ毎日に迷いがあっても気づかないふりをしてたんだ
ほんのちょっとの勇気がまだ出せなくって
まどろむ宇宙で彷徨っていた
夜空に浮かぶ星に願いをかけるんだ
I hope...
抱いてる夢を絶対諦めたくない
走りだすから追いかけて今 あの shooting star
見たことのないストーリー進んでいくんだ
いつの日にかきっと描いたセカイへ 辿り着けるように
Let go
Of the days you thought mattered so, life goes on,
tomorrow's rolling in
Is it the world we know, or the dream we sought so long？
もっと誰でもない自分になりたいんだ
新しい風が心を揺らした
It takes something to believe
The wish we were promised could really come to life
And so,
If this how the story goes
To find that strength inside, I'll remember why back then
You took my hand, and you said...
つかまえて、ほら このshooting star
さあ、まずは一歩 踏み出して 恐れずにゆこう
いつの日にかきっとまだ見ぬ世界へ 辿り着けるように
夜明けに咲いた月が 眩い ブルーの 空に溶けてく
You and I, an undecided future,
Doesn't matter if the final truth hurts
もうすぐ 朝が 動き出すから
抱きしめて今 この shooting star
見たことのないストーリー
I'll be here betting on that
Fearsome heart
Cuz you're that shooting star
It's hopeless now, but maybe if you take that step
Into the darkness, you'll find me
Running by your side until the dawn
In the end, it's you and me
Us against tomorrow
Face the world that we had dreamed
Dry your eyes, and don't look back.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Catch it, look, this shooting star
A world of our fiction awaits...
Even if I was lost in the same everyday life, I pretended not to notice
I couldn't quite find that bit of courage yet
I was wandering in the slumbering universe
I'll make a wish to the stars floating in the night sky
I hope...
I don't want to absolutely give up the dream I hold
Because I'll start running, so follow me now, that shooting star
An unseen story, it's advancing
So that one day I can surely reach the world I drew
Let go
Of the days you thought mattered so, life goes on,
tomorrow's rolling in
Is it the world we know, or the dream we sought so long?
I want to be myself, no one else
A new wind shook my heart
It takes something to believe
The wish we were promised could really come to life
And so,
If this how the story goes
To find that strength inside, I'll remember why back then
You took my hand, and you said...
Catch it, look, this shooting star
Come on, first take one step, step out and go without fear
So that one day I can surely reach the world I haven't seen yet
The moon that bloomed at dawn melts into the dazzling blue sky
You and I, an undecided future,
Doesn't matter if the final truth hurts
Because the morning will move soon
Hold it tight now, this shooting star
An unseen story
I'll be here betting on that
Fearsome heart
Cuz you're that shooting star
It's hopeless now, but maybe if you take that step
Into the darkness, you'll find me
Running by your side until the dawn
In the end, it's you and me
Us against tomorrow
Face the world that we had dreamed
Dry your eyes, and don't look back.
